items.description: Crash on I-80 westbound between 1 miles west of Exit 161: US 220 SOUTH/PA 26 - BELLEFONTE and 1.5 miles west of Exit 161: US 220 SOUTH/PA 26 - BELLEFONTE. There is a lane restriction.
